channel.title: Microsoft for Developers
channel.description: Get the latest information, insights, and news from Microsoft.

item.title: 【February 2026 Insiders (version 1.110)】2026 年 2 月 Insider（版本 1.110）
item.description: 【Learn what is new in the Visual Studio Code February 2026 Release (1.110). Read the full article】了解 Visual Studio Code 2026 年 2 月版本 (1.110) 中的新增功能。阅读全文

item.title: 【Updates to Team Calendar extension】团队日历扩展更新
item.description: 【We are excited to release a new update to the Team Calendar extension. This update includes a series of visual refinements across the extension, introducing a more consistent design language, smoother transitions when expanding and collapsing】我们很高兴发布团队日历扩展的新更新。此更新包括整个扩展中的一系列视觉改进，引入了更一致的设计语言，展开和折叠时的过渡更平滑

item.title: 【Engineering and algorithmic interventions for multimodal post-training at Microsoft scale】Microsoft 规模的多模式后期培训的工程和算法干预
item.description: 【Aditya Challapally leads post-training research and infrastructure for Copilot agent capabilities that process millions of multimodal interactions. This post builds on the diagnostics from D】Aditya Challapally 负责 Copilot 代理功能的培训后研究和基础设施，可处理数百万次多模式交互。这篇文章建立在 D 的诊断基础上

item.title: 【Intercepting messages inside Is­Dialog­Message, fine-tuning the message filter】拦截IsDialogMessage内部的消息，微调消息过滤器
item.description: 【Last time, we used a MSGF_DIALOG­BOX message filter to hook into the Is­Dialog­Message so that we had the option to grab the ESC】上次，我们使用 MSGF_DIALOGBOX 消息过滤器来挂钩 IsDialogMessage，以便我们可以选择获取 ESC

item.title: 【JCON Europe 2026: Java Modernization, Performance, and AI】JCON Europe 2026：Java 现代化、性能和人工智能
item.description: 【Java is the backbone of enterprise software engineering, and the conversations happening around it right now are the most exciting they've been in years. From AI-assisted development workflows to Kubernetes performance tuning, the community is moving fast - and】Java 是企业软件工程的支柱，目前围绕它进行的讨论是多年来最令人兴奋的。从人工智能辅助开发工作流程到 Kubernetes 性能调整，社区正在快速发展 - 而且

item.title: 【Azure DocumentDB: A Fully Managed MongoDB-Compatible Database】Azure DocumentDB：完全托管的 MongoDB 兼容数据库
item.description: 【Running MongoDB at scale eventually forces a trade-off: invest heavily in managing your own infrastructure or move to a managed service and risk losing the compatibility and portability your team depends on. 】大规模运行 MongoDB 最终会迫使您做出权衡：大力投资管理您自己的基础设施，或者迁移到托管服务，并冒着失去团队所依赖的兼容性和可移植性的风险。

item.title: 【Announcing Shader Model 6.9 Retail and New D3D12 Improvements】宣布推出 Shader Model 6.9 零售版和新的 D3D12 改进
item.description: 【Today, we are pleased to announce that Shader Model 6.9 and other features have been officially released with Agility SDK 1.619 and complementary DXC 1.9.2602.16. Many of these features have been in preview status since 2025. Simultaneously, we are releasing a handful】今天，我们很高兴地宣布，Shader Model 6.9 和其他功能已随 Agility SDK 1.619 和补充的 DXC 1.9.2602.16 正式发布。自 2025 年以来，其中许多功能一直处于预览状态。同时，我们正在发布一些功能

item.title: 【PIX 2602.25 and 2602.25-preview - support for new D3D features and misc quality-of-life improvements】PIX 2602.25 和 2602.25-preview - 支持新的 D3D 功能和其他生活质量改进
item.description: 【Today we released PIX 2602.25 and 2602.25-preview, which can be downloaded here. These releases include everything in the previous 2601.15 release, plus: 2602.25: includes support for all of】今天我们发布了 PIX 2602.25 和 2602.25 预览版，可以在此处下载。这些版本包括先前 2601.15 版本中的所有内容，此外： 2602.25：包括对所有

item.title: 【Vector Data in .NET - Building Blocks for AI Part 2】.NET 中的矢量数据 - AI 构建块第 2 部分
item.description: 【Welcome back to the building blocks for AI in .NET series! In part one, we explored Microsoft Extensions for AI (MEAI) and how it provides a unified interface for working with large language models. Today, we're diving into the second b】欢迎回到 .NET 中的 AI 构建块系列！在第一部分中，我们探讨了 Microsoft Extensions for AI (MEAI) 以及它如何提供用于处理大型语言模型的统一界面。今天我们要进入第二个b

item.title: 【Measuring actual AI Impact for Engineering with Apache DevLake】使用 Apache DevLake 衡量 AI 对工程的实际影响
item.description: 【If you want to skip the explain and get started super quick with adoption + impact insights, use gh-devlake to deploy a GitHub Copilot impact dashboard in a few CLI commands. So! You've rolled out GitHub Copilot to your engineering teams. You've got the built-in dashbo】如果您想跳过解释并快速开始了解采用率 + 影响洞察，请使用 gh-devlake 在几个 CLI 命令中部署 GitHub Copilot 影响仪表板。所以！您已向您的工程团队推出了 GitHub Copilot。你有内置的仪表板
